structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-30 MetroDPA EDGE Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-30 13:56:22-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Beginning June 2nd 2025, MetroDPA, specific to Colorado, will offer the Metro DPA Edge program. This addition offers a rate reduction at a cost of 2% of the first mortgage loan amount. Please see below for common FAQs about the program.

Q. Is the Lender charging the 2% discount points? 

A. Yes, the amount needs to appear on the closing disclosure. An updated CM code is in production to automatically trigger the discount points being added to the file. Please ensure the “Edge” CM code is selected, as outlined below. 

Conventional: CFBDMME30; FHA: FFBDMME30; VA: VFBDMME30; USDA: UFBDMME30

Q. Do the rate sheets reflect the discounted rate? 

A. Yes, the EDGE rates shown in the rate sheet are already reduced. The reduced rate is available at a cost of 2% in discount points of the first mortgage loan amount. 

Q. Can lenders charge discount points for the non-EDGE products? 

A. No, only the Edge product is eligible for the discount points. 

 

To see current rates, in addition to additional information and guides, click here <https://www.ehousingplus.com/homeownership/metrodpa/program-highlights/> . 

 

For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  

For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 

For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
